allow: Bash(git commit -m 'ci: Astroキャッシュ追加とnpm ciに変更してビルドを高速化 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'ci: cancel-in-progressをtrueに変更して連続プッシュ時の待機を解消 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'style: コードブロックをdarkテーマに変更、BlogCardのレイアウトバグを修正 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: OgPlaceholderの日本語折り返しを修正、KaTeXをセルフホストに変更 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: ホームページをリッチなインディゴ/バイオレット系デザインに刷新 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: load pagefind-ui.js as script tag instead of ES module import *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add sitemap and robots.txt for SEO *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add Google Search Console verification meta tag *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add JSON-LD structured data for SEO *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: split CLAUDE.md into focused docs, update spec *)
Bash(git commit -m 'style: hero section fills full viewport height on tablet/PC *)
Bash(git commit -m 'style: remove white bg from Projects and Education sections *)
Bash(git commit -m 'style: remove sidebar TOC, tighten section spacing, redesign Box *)
Bash(git commit -m 'style: force dark code blocks, prevent typography override *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: 画像パスを @assets/blog/slide-generator/ に修正 *)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); idx=html.find\('<details'\); print\(html[max\(0,idx-100\):idx+500] if idx!=-1 else 'NO DETAILS FOUND'\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let i=d.indexOf\('<details'\); console.log\(i!==-1 ? d.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-50\),i+600\) : 'NO DETAILS FOUND'\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let i=d.indexOf\('expressive-code'\); console.log\(i!==-1 ? d.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-200\),i+400\) : 'NOT FOUND'\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let m=d.match\(/<\(pre|figure|code\)[^>]*>/g\); console.log\(m ? m.slice\(0,20\).join\('\\n'\) : 'NONE'\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let all=[...d.matchAll\(/<figure class=\\"frame/g\)]; console.log\('Total code figures:', all.length\); let i=d.indexOf\('collapsed'\); console.log\('collapsed text found:', i, i!==-1 ? d.slice\(i-100,i+200\) : ''\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let i=d.indexOf\('cloudecode-action'\); let j=d.indexOf\('claudecode-action'\); let k=d.indexOf\('issue.png'\); console.log\('cloudecode:', i, 'claudecode:', j, 'issue.png:', k\); let m=d.match\(/<img[^>]+>/g\); if\(m\) m.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(t=>console.log\(t\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let m=d.match\(/<style[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/g\); m&&m.forEach\(s=>{ if\(s.includes\('img'\)||s.includes\('max-w'\)\) console.log\(s.slice\(0,2000\)\); }\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let style=d.match\(/<style[^>]*data-vite-dev-id[^>]*global\\.css[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/\); if\(style\) { let css=style[1]; let img=css.indexOf\(':where\(img'\); let img2=css.indexOf\('prose-img'\); console.log\('img idx:', img, 'prose-img idx:', img2\); if\(img>=0\) console.log\(css.slice\(img,img+200\)\); if\(img2>=0\) console.log\(css.slice\(img2,img2+200\)\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let style=d.match\(/<style[^>]*data-vite-dev-id[^>]*global\\.css[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/\); if\(style\) { let css=style[1]; let i=css.indexOf\('prose-img'\); while\(i>=0&&i<css.length\) { console.log\(css.slice\(i,i+250\)\); console.log\('---'\); i=css.indexOf\('prose-img',i+1\); if\(i>css.indexOf\('prose-img'\)+2000\) break; } } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let style=d.match\(/<style[^>]*data-vite-dev-id[^>]*global\\.css[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/\); if\(style\) { let css=style[1]; let i=css.indexOf\(':where\(img\)'\); while\(i>=0\) { console.log\(css.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-50\),i+300\)\); console.log\('---'\); let next=css.indexOf\(':where\(img\)',i+1\); if\(next===i||next<0\) break; i=next; } } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let m=d.match\(/<style[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/g\); m&&m.forEach\(s=>{ if\(s.includes\('0d1117'\)||s.includes\('#0d'\)||s.includes\('github'\)\) { console.log\(s.slice\(0,500\)\); console.log\('---'\); } }\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let m=d.match\(/<style[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/g\); m&&m.forEach\(s=>{ if\(s.includes\('background'\)\) { console.log\('---STYLE---'\); console.log\(s.replace\(/<[^>]*>/g,''\).slice\(0,300\)\); } }\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let m=d.match\(/<style[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/g\); m&&m.forEach\(s=>{ if\(s.includes\('expressive-code'\)\) { let content=s.replace\(/<[^>]*>/g,''\); console.log\(content.slice\(0,3000\)\); } }\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let styles=[...d.matchAll\(/<style\([^>]*\)>/g\)]; styles.forEach\(\(m,i\)=>console.log\(i, m[1].slice\(0,100\)\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let styles=[...d.matchAll\(/<style\([^>]*\)>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/g\)]; let ec=styles.find\(m=>!m[1].includes\('data-vite'\)\); if\(ec\) { let css=ec[2]; let i=css.indexOf\('ec-codeBg'\); console.log\(i>=0 ? css.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-100\),i+200\) : 'NOT FOUND'\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let styles=[...d.matchAll\(/<style\([^>]*\)>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/g\)]; styles.forEach\(\(m,i\)=>{ if\(!m[1].includes\('data-vite'\)\) { console.log\('EC-like style index:', i, 'length:', m[2].length\); console.log\(m[2].slice\(0,500\)\); } }\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let styles=[...d.matchAll\(/<style\([^>]*\)>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/g\)]; let ec=styles[7]; if\(ec\) { let css=ec[2]; let i=css.indexOf\(':root'\); console.log\(i>=0 ? css.slice\(i,i+500\) : 'NO ROOT'\); let j=css.indexOf\('codeBg'\); console.log\(j>=0 ? css.slice\(Math.max\(0,j-100\),j+300\) : 'NO CODEBG'\); } }\)")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let i=d.indexOf\('expressive-code'\); let block=d.slice\(i,i+2000\); console.log\(block\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let matches=[...d.matchAll\(/class=\\"expressive-code[^\\"]*\\"/g\)]; matches.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(m=>{ let i=m.index; console.log\(d.slice\(i-20,i+500\)\); console.log\('---'\); }\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let m=d.match\(/<div class=\\"expressive-code\\"><style>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/\); if\(m\) { let css=m[1]; let i=css.indexOf\(':root'\); console.log\(i>=0 ? css.slice\(i,i+800\) : 'NO ROOT IN INLINE'\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let m=d.match\(/<div class=\\"expressive-code\\"><style>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/\); if\(m\) { let css=m[1]; let i=css.indexOf\('color:var'\); console.log\(i>=0 ? css.slice\(i,i+500\) : 'NOT FOUND'\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let m=d.match\(/<div class=\\"expressive-code\\"><style>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/\); if\(m\) { let css=m[1]; let i=css.indexOf\('var\(--0\)'\); console.log\('var\(--0\) idx:', i\); i=css.indexOf\('--1'\); console.log\('--1 idx:', i\); i=css.lastIndexOf\('}'\); console.log\('last 500 chars:', css.slice\(-500\)\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let m=d.match\(/<div class=\\"expressive-code\\"><style>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/\); if\(m\) { let css=m[1]; let i=css.indexOf\('var\(--0'\); console.log\('var\(--0 idx:', i\); if\(i>=0\) console.log\(css.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-300\),i+200\)\); } }\)")
